title: Cat Age Calculator - Cat Years to Human Years
shortDescription: Convert your cat's age into human-equivalent years instantly.
description: The Cat age calculator turns your cat's age into human-equivalent years. The first year counts as about 15 human years, the second adds about 9 (24 by age two), and each year after that adds roughly 4. Enter your cat's age to see its human age in seconds.
metaDescription: Use this Cat age calculator to convert your cat's age into human years. The first year is about 15, year two reaches 24, then add 4 human years each year after.

result.label: Human-equivalent age
result.empty: Enter your cat's age in years to see the human-equivalent age.

sections.heading: How cat years compare to human years
paragraphs: Cats mature quickly when young, then age more steadily. A common guide puts the first year at about 15 human years and the second at about 9 more, reaching 24 by age two.
After that, each additional cat year adds roughly 4 human years, so a 5-year-old cat is around 36 in human terms.

sections.heading: Why these numbers are estimates
paragraphs: Breed, size, diet, and lifestyle all affect how a cat ages. Indoor cats often live longer than outdoor cats, so treat the result as a friendly estimate rather than a medical fact.
For health concerns, your veterinarian remains the best source of advice about your cat's life stage.

howTo.name: Enter your cat's age
howTo.text: Type your cat's age in years into the input field.

howTo.name: Read the result
howTo.text: The calculator shows the human-equivalent age right away.

howTo.name: Compare and share
howTo.text: Try different ages to compare life stages, then share the result with friends.

faq.q: How is a cat's age converted to human years?
faq.a: The first year counts as about 15 human years, the second adds about 9 (24 total), then each later year adds roughly 4.

faq.q: How old is a 1-year-old cat in human years?
faq.a: About 15 human years, since the first year of life is the fastest stage of aging for a cat.

faq.q: How old is a 2-year-old cat in human years?
faq.a: Around 24 human years, after adding about 9 to the first year's 15.
No. It is a popular estimate. Breed, size, diet, and indoor or outdoor living all change how a cat ages.

faq.q: Does the formula work for kittens under one year?
faq.a: It is designed for whole years. Kittens age very fast, so use the result as a rough guide only.
